ALL-WEATHER PROTECTION

Temporary Roofs

Keep your project moving regardless of the British weather. Our temporary roof solutions provide comprehensive cover for major structural works.

Site Protection Systems

Temporary roof scaffolding, also known as tin hats, is essential for major renovation work where the original roof is removed. It ensures your building remains watertight, protecting timber, plasterwork, and electrical systems from rain and wind damage.

Our Systems Include:

  • 🏢 **Corrugated Tin Sheets**: Robust, traditional weather protection.
  • 🏠 **Shrink Wrap Systems**: Seamless, high-performance protection for complex shapes.
  • 📍 **Keder Roof Systems**: Modular aluminum systems for rapid install.
  • 📜 **Full Encapsulation**: Complete side-cladding to block wind-driven rain.

Ideal For:

  • • Full Loft Conversions
  • • New Build Housing
  • • Fire Damage Repairs
  • • Listed Building Restoration
  • • Any job where the roof is exposed
Get a Roof Quote

Don't let the Rain Stop Work

Our temporary roof designs are calculated for wind-loading and structural integrity, ensuring your site remains safe and dry even in the harshest conditions.

Haki Systems

Rapidly deployed, high-strength beam systems for large spans.

Internal Protection

Floor protection and internal debris netting for added safety.
